blended.narrative: Soda Springs is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
